mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT user_id FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (id, user_id, category, title, content) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{req.category}, #{req.title}, #{req.content})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (id, post_id, user_id) VALUES (UUID(), #{postId}, #{userId})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND category = #{category}
SELECT id, title, category, view_count, like_count, comment_count, created_at FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
